text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap has managed to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while still basking in the glory of our
accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Bear with me for just a little longer. I'm almost
done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap invited me to meet her down by the
river where we often train together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I followed the recipe from back home as closely
as I could, so I'm sure it'll taste delicious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It turns out she's making stewed meat.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I wanted to show you how much I appreciate you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Training with you has helped me grow into a
better racer.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in my hometown is really pleased with
my progress too. It's like a dream come true for
me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you for running by my side all this time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's keep racing toward our goals together.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: These five bowls aren't gonna eat themselves!
